name: Next.js + MongoDB with Docker Compose
description: Deploy Next.js with MongoDB using Docker Compose for full stack management

steps.name: Create docker-compose.yml
steps.command:
cat > ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    image: ${DOCKER_IMAGE}
    container_name: ${APP_NAME}
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT}:3000"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV}
      - MONGODB_URI=mongodb://${MONGODB_USER}:${MONGODB_PASSWORD}@mongo:27017/doez
      - JWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET}
    depends_on:
      - mongo
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - doez-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/check"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  mongo:
    image: mongo:6.0
    container_name: ${APP_NAME}-mongo
    environment:
      - MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME=root
      - MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD=${MONGODB_ROOT_PASSWORD}
      - MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE=doez
    volumes:
      - mongo_data:/data/db
      - mongo_config:/data/configdb
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - doez-network

volumes:
  mongo_data:
  mongo_config:

networks:
  doez-network:
    driver: bridge
EOF

steps.name: Create .env file
Create init-mongo script
Wait for services to be ready
Verify MongoDB connection
steps.command: cd ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH} && docker-compose exec -T mongo mongo --username root --password ${MONGODB_ROOT_PASSWORD} --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')"
